final:
module top_module (
        input m,
        input n,
        input o,
        output reg j);assign j = ( ~m & ~n & o ) |
				( ~m & n & ~o ) |
				( m & ~n & o ) |
				( m & n & o ) ;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      j <= ~m & ~n & ~o;
      j <= ~m & n & o;
      j <= m & ~n & ~o;
      j <= m & n & ~o;
    end
  end

endmodule
